tool.name: ebay_bulk_search
tool.description: Search multiple products on eBay in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling ebay_search multiple times - it is faster and more efficient. Pass all queries as a single comma-separated string. Example: 'vintage watches,gaming laptop,nike air max'.

parameters.name: queries
parameters.description: Comma-separated search queries (e.g. 'mechanical keyboard,wireless mouse,monitor stand')
